str_9F68377A: After arriving at the police station, I was thoroughly examined.
str_328E7FBB: They took my fingerprints, blood samples. They took swabs from my wounds and from under my nails, as well as a hair sample.
str_FE358A2B: It felt like this went on for an eternity. I couldn't believe what was happening.
str_4D5298F3: I wanted to wake up, as if from a nightmare, to be back in the tent, watching the sunrise with Miranda.
str_7719D43A: But no matter how hard I tried, the awakening never came to me. And reality, mixed with fear, plunged my consciousness into an endless stupor.
str_EEF1D799: Hello again, Alice! I'm Officer Charles Garcia.
str_D0646CD5: My head slowly turned towards the officer's voice. It seemed the worst was yet to come.
str_EA394FE8: We managed to find some things that the forensic experts don't need.
str_299B31FD: You can change your clothes and freshen up before the interrogation.
str_B3D56116: The officer tossed a bag with clothes in front of me. I looked inside. Most of the contents belonged to Miranda.
str_62C9C868: Casual Top with ring and denim shorts
str_D561FE98: Club Leggings and transparent tank top
str_ED621516: Outfit after incident Shirt and jeans
str_CB68B570: I washed my face, fixed my hair, and changed clothes.
str_E455F934: The officer entered the room without knocking. His face showed no emotion, and his voice, frightening and dry, filled the entire room with cold.
str_F5933770: So, who was the deceased to you?
str_7F3A71A9: Miranda and I were close friends.
str_62ED73C1: How close? What do you think, Officer, how close can girls who have spent their entire lives together be?
str_625706C2: By the end of that sentence, my voice had risen to a shout.
str_9A113217: If only it were that simple, Miss. Do you know what a crime of passion or in the heat of anger is? Do you think such events depend on the years you've spent together?
str_4C46D8AC: I think, Sir, that people who have spent so many years together have grown accustomed to each other and cannot be subject to such frightening impulses.
str_7BDE42D5: We are good friends, went to the same school, the same clubs, often hung out together.
str_18DA8E06: We've known each other for quite a while. We live in the same city.
str_E16A6AA4: Don't you get tired of being together so often?
str_1C93A665: Let's get to the point of this conversation. Where were you last night?
str_8AE894E0: Okay, then tell me about yesterday during the day.
str_2D16A645: We came to the beach, set up the tent. Then we met two guys.
str_7C33F1C1: As I understand it, that's Mr. Edwin Duval and Mr. Mark Sin.
str_619044B6: I don't know their last names, but yes. That's them.
str_58441AC3: When you were on the beach, how did you interact?
str_D8BF68ED: Thank you for the truth. Edwin confirmed your words and said that you also exchanged phone numbers.
str_1B7877B6: Thank you for the truth. Edwin confirmed your words.
str_17B4A190: The officer noted that you are telling the truth.
str_A2FFABEE: How strange, Edwin said that you were flirting with Mark and gave him your number.
str_39C07570: How strange, Edwin said the opposite, that you paid more attention to Mark.
str_D9130DBB: The officer thinks you are lying to him!
str_F6AFAE88: Strange, the guys said you weren't very sociable.
str_24C3BCCC: Thank you for the honest answer. Mark said that you even gave him your number.
str_63AE6271: Thank you for the honest answer. Mark said the same.
str_672D07FA: Well, Mark told me the opposite.
str_D6108527: Strange, because Mark thought quite differently.
str_76DE0E34: Really? And you just gave Edwin your number like that?
str_A9FD6F05: Really? Edwin thought he had caught your interest.
str_5BCFFBE1: Thank you for your honesty. The guys confirmed it.
str_B417D0F8: I'm glad we started with the truth. I hope you continue in the same vein.
str_E8706911: Alice, I hope your answers start to resemble the truth more.
str_C6045949: Goosebumps ran down my body from the officer's words.
str_D20A9079: Tell me, how did the guys react to Miranda?
str_77855906: The officer thinks you are telling the truth.
str_531FB906: The officer was interested in your words.
str_989C6EDA: Okay. And how did she react to them?
str_C1A553B0: Let's move on. What happened after you met the guys?
str_AA4B410A: They left, and we agreed to meet them after the concert we were going to.
str_9B61CE65: Was there anything else strange before the concert?
str_46A9309E: He scared us and he had stones in his bag. He was acting aggressive.
str_32EC1274: What happened when you got to the club?
str_45F381C9: In more detail, who did you talk to, what else did you do?
str_CDF3F8D2: Really? Edwin said you spent time together.
str_C6C970DF: Hmm, I got different information from Mark. He said you spent time with him.
str_537A0A59: Okay, he told me the same.
str_F9D6DE52: Alice, tell me, what was your relationship with Miranda that day? Didn't you argue with her?
str_ADF744C7: How did she feel about you spending time with Mark?
str_2629BB67: I don't remember what happened after that.
str_CF604125: And Miranda wasn't bothered by your flirting with Mark?
str_8303D3A3: It's just resort fun. Nothing serious.
str_65A46329: It was just socializing, I'm an open person.
str_8DA1CCA3: I don't want to talk about it.
str_FF8EA72C: We just misunderstood each other, it happens.
str_B94B7E6A: Climate change, a lot happened during the day. It's hard for me to be nice under these conditions.
str_54A2F7AD: I talked a bit with a guy at the bar. His name was Tom.
str_EE176D45: Did he know anything about you?
str_03E60B3B: Yes, we told him we were staying on the beach.
str_D61968C1: No, we didn't tell him where we were staying.
str_FAF104DE: You told Tom where you were staying.
str_0110FE0F: You did not tell Tom where you were staying.
str_93F304B9: Alice, why do you think you don't remember last night?
str_66998B22: I think someone spiked my drinks.
str_FCA44CB7: The officer considered that you were telling the truth.
str_A3D6986B: I'll check your words, but for now, you cannot leave the city.
str_E25A19CB: We found your phone and bag. You can take them. I'll give you some time to gather your thoughts.
str_5E5B2D4A: Tom – the guy I was chatting with at the bar
str_00FD8398: The officer was interested in your words
str_B2111E0A: The officer left, and I continued to sit on the chair, afraid to stand up and leave the room. I didn't know what to do or how to handle this situation.
str_CF9AEC7A: What to do? Go back to the beach where a murder recently took place?
str_934BAE57: I have almost no money. What's in my bag certainly won't be enough for a hotel.
str_D1CA8764: I was frantically turning my phone over in my hands.
str_0359E50F: I need to write to someone. Ask for help.
str_70610997: I'm not allowed to leave the city, and I have no money for a hotel. I don't want to go back to the tent.
str_9307AD88: You know, I have several apartments that I rent to tourists. One of them is free now. You can stay there.
str_5ACF4A60: Sorry, but I don't know you well enough to help in a situation like this.
str_7107CE65: I guess I shouldn't have written to you.
str_E6A88062: It's okay. Tell me where you are, and I'll come get you.
str_4FF30C27: Thank you, I don't even know how to thank you for this.
str_57B35518: Don't worry, I'll be there soon.
str_074F5005: You have a good relationship with Edwin.
str_E9B483F3: You don't have a good enough relationship with Edwin.
str_637A2CDD: A thought crossed my mind, maybe Mark would help me.
str_01907D42: I frantically started typing a message for him
str_5F86029D: The police said I need to stay in town while the investigation is ongoing. But I can't go back to the beach, and I have no money.
str_DEB3A03C: I see. I can offer you to crash at my place.
str_34909B20: You have a good relationship with Mark.
str_54ABE308: You don't have a good enough relationship with Mark.
str_DC9E59FA: Martin Hole, 114 / 56. Come over, I'll be waiting for you.
str_D8FDF604: It seems it was a mistake to write to him.
str_20718A2A: I realized that only family are the people I can ask for help.
str_EF1E879B: But what do I say? That Miranda was killed and I'm now among the suspects? That I'm left without money in a foreign country?
str_DE57F7C9: My fingers trembled nervously, and my palms sweated. What should I write?
str_FD6B8D7C: Hi, Mom, I need your help.
str_2DB4967C: Can you send me some money? I just lost my cash.
str_45929847: The thing is, Miranda was killed, and I'm among the suspects.
str_1549F10A: It's okay, sorry. I just missed you and wanted to chat.
str_F40AC98A: Oh, honey, you know that Dad and I just paid for university last week. I'm sorry, I can only send you a little money to your card.
str_16347B07: Thanks, Mom. I think I'll manage, everything will be okay.
str_9111D49D: It was stupid to ask my parents for money, things are already hard for them because of my enrollment.
str_2FF9C213: What? You need to get out of there immediately!
str_EAAC9925: I can't. I'm not allowed to leave the city. And I have no money left.
str_22189A59: I probably shouldn't have worried my parents, because my father has a bad heart. And Mom will be worried now.
str_E43BF857: God, Alice. We can't come to you, and we have no money left after paying for the first semester of university.
str_7C5F1E58: I think everything will be okay. They'll definitely find the guilty party. And I'll crash with new acquaintances.
str_47E460EE: Keep me posted. I'll try to think of something.
str_0235397C: It's okay, I'll manage and be back home soon.
str_54912F5C: Sweetie, write anytime. I'm always happy to talk to you.
str_04629201: I couldn't tell her the truth, but maybe that's for the best. I couldn't bear it if they suffered because of me.
str_6E23A2BC: A reminder of unread messages appeared on the screen. It was the conversation with Miranda.
str_E8430DB9: I was overcome by a fear I hadn't felt in a long time.
str_F6C50DC1: All my feelings, like an avalanche, carried me away to the worst possible scenarios of what could have happened last night.
str_4B4AB163: I didn't want to believe it was true.
str_D866BE5F: I'm tired of your actions. Are you never to blame for anything? Always pure and innocent? Well, of course.
str_4823ECB2: Like to attract attention to yourself? Let's see who'll need you without me!
str_DDF21A90: From the very first second we got here, you decided to push your own agenda. To show me how great you are, that you're better than me? Go ahead.
str_CC42FDF6: I don't want to see you anymore.
str_E41752F7: I'm tired of you, Alice. I don't want to see you anymore.
str_8B32FC0D: I've been thinking about our friendship. You know, I don't want to lose you after all.
str_19BBD8F3: I've been thinking about our friendship. You know, our paths should diverge after this trip.
str_3AAEE6E1: The officer entered the room again, shuffling through the folder with Miranda's case in his hands.
str_403938D0: Have you come to your senses?
str_CBF91382: Let's exchange contact information. We'll need to meet often over the next week.
str_6662F584: I held out my phone to the officer.
str_E96373A4: The officer stood right in front of me. The rays of the daytime sun, breaking through the blinds, gently fell on his shoulders and face.
str_E433B11E: For the first time today, I thought of something good. I was mesmerized by him.
str_232FBD16: He came close, handing the phone back.
str_1732CC53: His eyes were fixed intently on mine, and I was afraid to break this moment, this calm that I felt next to him.
str_3DBCAC02: You have a good relationship with the Officer.
str_E5F3D008: I hope you find who did this.
str_7DBF41AE: You can contact me anytime. I'll be happy to help you, especially if you remember anything about last night.
str_DF9E4F7C: Thank you, Charles. I'm glad I met you
str_E64C71CC: Sorry, Mr. Garcia, but I'll stick to a more formal style.
str_19501E38: I'll try not to forget your name
str_CCE61EB8: Only half of one of the most terrible days of my life had passed, and I was afraid to imagine what awaited me next.
str_6CAF676E: I don't remember this correspondence at all.
str_36E7B3A3: Thank you for your cooperation. Stay in touch.
str_6A8220DA: You don't have a good enough relationship with the Officer.
str_D100CE8D: Stay in touch, they might come for you at any moment.
str_C5D200A9: You'd better find the real killer, Officer.
str_DC09E31E: I hope you come to me with news of who really did this.
str_C5F1750B: Don't worry, that's what I'll do.
